name: Smart Hybrid300
comment:
EAGLE LITE PRO Smart Hybrid300: SMART HYBRID300 is equipped with a powerful 300W LED light source with a color temperature of 6700K, which delivers a sharp and intense cone. HYBRID300 has CMY blades, color wheel, rotating gobos, an 8-facet prism, Motorized Iris, frost filter and motorized zoom. 
With the many effects such as zoom, Iris, gobos and prism and its robust construction, low noise fans and temperature regulation, the HYBRID300 is a reliable partner in professional tasks.

HYBRID300 is an ideal partner for concerts, theatres, touring and live entertainment
